title: Full Stack Developer (Next.js + Laravel + AI Integration)
description: About Role We are looking for a highly experienced Full Stack Developer who takes ownership, thrives on accountability, and operates with a strong growth mindset. This role is for someone who doesn’t just execute tasks, but actively shapes systems, improves processes, and builds scalable, future-ready platforms. You will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and evolving a high-performance digital platform, working across both frontend and backend while leading the integration of AI-driven capabilities into the system. Key Responsibility Design, develop, and maintain robust full stack applications Lead frontend development using Next.js with a strong focus on performance, UX, and scalability Build and maintain backend systems using Laravel Architect and manage APIs, databases, and system integrations Integrate AI tools, models, and workflows into the platform (automation, personalization, intelligent features) Take full ownership of features from concept to deployment Ensure code quality, performance optimization, and system reliability Collaborate closely with product, design, and leadership teams Continuously evaluate and adopt new technologies, especially in AI and modern web development Required Skills & Experience Design, develop, and maintain robust full stack applications Lead frontend development using Next.js with a strong focus on performance, UX, and scalability Build and maintain backend systems using Laravel Architect and manage APIs, databases, and system integrations Integrate AI tools, models, and workflows into the platform (automation, personalization, intelligent features) Take full ownership of features from concept to deployment Ensure code quality, performance optimization, and system reliability Collaborate closely with product, design, and leadership teams Continuously evaluate and adopt new technologies, especially in AI and modern web development What We’re Looking For High level of ownership and accountability A builder mentality: you ship, iterate, and improve Strong growth mindset and curiosity, especially around AI Someone who challenges the status quo and pushes systems forward Clear communicator and team player Nice to Have Experience with real-time systems, microservices, or scalable cloud infrastructure Familiarity with AI frameworks, prompt engineering, or model fine-tuning Experience working on platform-based products or SaaS systems Work Setup Full-time, on-site role in Istanbul Fast-paced, high-performance environment Direct impact on product and technology direction If you’re someone who builds with intent, thinks in systems, and wants to be at the intersection of software and AI, this role is built for you.

title: Backend Engineer - Wallets
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Backend Engineer - Wallets in Turkey. This is a unique opportunity to contribute to the future of decentralized finance by building secure, scalable, and high-performance backend systems that power global digital asset solutions. In this role, you will work on mission-critical wallet infrastructure, helping create seamless and reliable experiences for users interacting with blockchain technologies worldwide. You will collaborate with highly skilled international teams in a fast-paced, innovation-driven environment focused on scalability, security, and technical excellence. The position is ideal for engineers who enjoy solving complex backend challenges and building resilient systems capable of supporting rapidly growing platforms. You’ll work with modern technologies, distributed architectures, and cutting-edge financial applications while helping shape the evolution of digital finance. The environment values autonomy, continuous learning, collaboration, and a strong engineering mindset. Accountabilities Design, develop, and maintain robust backend services that support secure and scalable wallet infrastructure and digital asset operations. Build and optimize high-performance microservices capable of handling large-scale real-time transactions and platform growth. Collaborate with cross-functional engineering teams to deliver innovative backend solutions aligned with evolving product and business requirements. Ensure the highest standards of platform security, implementing best practices to protect user assets, sensitive data, and system integrity. Contribute to architectural decisions and continuously improve system reliability, scalability, and maintainability. Work with databases and distributed systems to ensure efficient data storage, retrieval, and synchronization. Investigate, troubleshoot, and resolve backend performance issues while proactively identifying opportunities for optimization. Stay current with emerging blockchain, peer-to-peer, and backend development technologies to drive innovation across the platform. Requirements Strong professional experience with Node.js and JavaScript backend development. Solid understanding of microservices architecture and scalable distributed systems. Experience building and maintaining complex, high-availability backend platforms. Familiarity with peer-to-peer technologies and decentralized systems. Proficiency working with databases such as MySQL and MongoDB. Strong understanding of backend security principles and experience implementing secure coding practices. Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies, frameworks, and technical environments. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to performance, reliability, and scalability. Excellent communication and collaboration skills within remote and international teams. Experience working in Agile development environments is considered an asset. Interest or experience in blockchain, fintech, or digital asset ecosystems is highly valued. Benefits Fully remote work environment with the flexibility to work from anywhere. Opportunity to contribute to innovative decentralized finance and blockchain technologies. Exposure to large-scale global platforms and cutting-edge backend systems. Collaborative international culture with access to highly skilled engineering teams. Fast-paced and innovation-focused environment that encourages ownership and technical growth. Opportunities for continuous learning, experimentation, and career advancement. Flexible work culture designed to support autonomy and productivity. Chance to work on impactful products shaping the future of digital finance and peer-to-peer technologies. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Full Stack Developer | $80/hr Remote
description: Position: Senior Full Stack Developer Type: Contract Compensation: $30 - $80/hour Location: Remote Commitment: 10-40 hrs/week Role Responsibilities Design and build scalable web applications with a focus on performance and usability. Utilize React.js and Node.js to create intuitive user interfaces and robust server-side logic. Implement and maintain AWS infrastructure for seamless deployment and operation. Develop and optimize databases with PostgreSQL for efficient data management. Leverage the Serverless Framework to enhance application scalability and efficiency. Integrate WebRTC for real-time communication solutions. Requirements Have proven experience as a Full Stack Developer with expertise in React.js, Node.js, AWS, PostgreSQL, Serverless Framework, and WebRTC. Have mandatory production experience in full-screen video recording from a browser, capturing both user and system audio without third-party extensions. Possess strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently. Demonstrate excellent written and verbal communication skills with a detail-oriented approach. Have a solid understanding of software development methodologies and best practices. Have experience with testing frameworks and version control systems. Application Process Easy Apply on LinkedIn Check email for next steps Participate in resume evaluation & interview stage

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Cloud, Kubernetes, CI/CD ve developer experience alanlarında global ölçekte ürün geliştiren ekibimize katılacak Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Kasnak Cloud olarak yazılım üreten şirketlerin deployment, test ortamı ve CI/CD süreçlerini dakikalar içinde yönetebileceği bir platform geliştiriyoruz. Hedefimiz: Yazılım ekiplerinin infrastructure, pipeline ve deployment karmaşasıyla uğraşmadan sadece ürün geliştirmeye odaklanmasını sağlamak. Şu an ürünün erken aşamasındayız. Bu yüzden sadece “task yapan developer” değil, ürünün teknik yönüne etki edecek takım arkadaşları arıyoruz. Bizimle Neler Yapacaksın? Gerçek kullanıcı problemi çözen özellikler geliştireceksin Frontend ve backend tarafında uçtan uca geliştirme yapacaksın Docker, Kubernetes ve cloud-native sistemlerle çalışacaksın CI/CD pipeline mimarilerine katkı sağlayacaksın Developer experience odaklı ürünler geliştireceksin Hızlı iterasyon yapan küçük bir ekibin parçası olacaksın Teknik karar süreçlerinde doğrudan söz sahibi olacaksın Aradığımız Profil Ürün geliştirmeyi seven “Nasıl daha iyisini yaparız?” bakış açısına sahip Araştırmayı ve yeni teknoloji öğrenmeyi seven Sorumluluk alabilen Startup temposuna uyum sağlayabilecek Takip edilmeden iş üretebilen Teknik Olarak Beklediklerimiz Aşağıdakilerin tamamını bilmen gerekmiyor ama çoğuna yakın olman önemli 👇 Frontend React Next.js TypeScript Backend Java / Spring Boot Node.js Golang Bonus Puan 🔥 Kubernetes bilgisi Docker deneyimi CI/CD bilgisi Hyperscale cloud sistemleriyle çalışma deneyimi Open source katkısı Kendi yan projelerinin olması Neden Kasnak Cloud? Çünkü burada: Gerçek ürün geliştiriyoruz Yazdığın kod direkt kullanıcıya dokunuyor Büyük şirketlerdeki gibi aylarca ticket beklemiyorsun Teknik olarak kendini ciddi geliştirebileceğin bir ortam var Yeni teknolojileri gerçekten kullanıyoruz Kurumsal hantallık yerine hız ve etki odaklı ilerliyoruz Bu Pozisyon Hakkında Kasnak Cloud şu an erken aşama bir startup olarak büyüme sürecindedir. Bu nedenle pozisyon klasik kurumsal iş modelinden farklı ilerlemektedir. Bu süreçte ürünün teknik gelişiminde doğrudan etkisi olacak, uzun vadeli düşünebilen ve startup kültürünü seven takım arkadaşları arıyoruz. Katkı modeline göre aşağıdaki seçenekler değerlendirilebilir: Equity (hisse) İlerleyen süreçte ücretli çalışma modeli Teknik partnerlik / founding team yapısı Amacımız kısa vadeli çalışan ilişkisi değil, ürünü birlikte büyütecek güçlü bir ekip kurmak 🚀

title: Software Engineer (Full Stack)
description: Who Are We? Profen, founded in 1995, is a global company that offers products and services to the Communication Technologies, Defense Technologies, Teleport & Satellite Network Services, Media & Broadcasting sectors with its growing R&D center. PROFEN, headquartered in Istanbul, offers innovative and high-tech solutions with its Ankara and Konya offices. PROFEN continues its activities by offering solutions in the following areas: Telecommunication Infrastructures Satellite Ground Segment Systems Data Center Design and Installation Defense Technologies Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or related disciplines 7+ years of professional Java experience in web-based technologies (design, development, and maintenance) Hands-on experience with Java 8, 11, 17, and 21 Proficient in Git and Maven Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with Amazon AWS Strong experience with relational databases (RDBMS), preferably PostgreSQL Proven experience in SQL query optimization Full-stack development experience with Angular or React on the front-end Solid understanding of RESTful JSON APIs, SOA, and Event-Driven Architectures Experience with container technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes, or OpenShift Familiarity with messaging platforms (Kafka, EMS, ActiveMQ, and/or IBM MQ) Experience with monitoring and alerting tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and ElasticSearch Preferably experienced in the aviation MRO / logistics domain Ability to read and understand technical documentation in English Job Description Design and develop required enhancements for the existing visioMAX software Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve software defects and performance issues Write and maintain unit and integration test codes Collaborate closely with users and stakeholders to understand software requirements and user needs Manage cloud-based and on-premise deployment, maintenance, and operational support processes Take an active role in designing, developing, and maintaining highly available and resilient applications

title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend)
company: IO PROCESS Elektronik Makine San. ve Tic A.S.
description: Biz Ne Yapıyoruz? HELYU sağlık, endüstri, finans ve lojistik sektörlerindeki işletmelerin dijital dönüşümlerine; özel yazılım, yapay zeka çözümleri ve stratejik danışmanlıkla yol gösteriyor. Olmazsa Olmazlar · Bilgisayar Mühendisliği (4 yıl ve üzeri) bölümlerinden mezun , · İzmir’de ikamet eden ve ofisinde düzenli çalışabilecek , · Takım çalışmasına yatkın ve sorumluluk sahibi, · İngilizce teknik dokümantasyon okuyup yazabilme yetkinliği olan, Genel Nitelikler · En az 4 yıl backend yazılım geliştirme deneyimi olan, · Node.js / TypeScript, Python ile geliştirme yapmış, · RESTful API tasarımı konusunda deneyimli, · PostgreSQL veya benzeri ilişkisel veritabanlarında çalışmış, · Python tabanlı veri işleme, AI entegrasyonları veya backend servis geliştirme deneyimi, · Docker ve tercihen Kubernetes bilgisi olan, · Git ve modern CI/CD süreçlerine hakim, · Mikroservis veya modüler monolit mimarilerle çalışmış, · Veri odaklı platformlar, event-driven sistemler veya analytics/data pipeline yapıları konusunda deneyimli, · AI kod asistanları (Claude, Cursor vb.) ile çalışmış veya öğrenmeye açık, · AI destekli platformlar veya ölçeklenebilir SaaS ürünlerinde deneyim sahibi, · Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme becerisi yüksek, İş Tanımı · Farklı sektörlerde geliştirilen dijital platformların backend mimarisinde aktif rol almak, · Ölçeklenebilir, güvenli ve sürdürülebilir backend servisleri geliştirmek, · API tasarımı, authentication ve yetkilendirme mekanizmalarını geliştirmek, · Veri işleme, event akışları ve analytics ihtiyaçlarına yönelik ölçeklenebilir servisler geliştirmek, · Event-driven veya mesajlaşma tabanlı sistemlerde aktif rol almak, · AI destekli kod üretimi süreçlerinde bilinçli validasyon yapmak, · Üretilen kod için test senaryoları oluşturmak ve kaliteyi güvence altına almak, · Mevcut sistemlerin performans ve güvenlik optimizasyonlarını yapmak, · Yeni teknolojileri takip ederek sistemlerin ölçeklenebilirliğini artırmak. Çalışma Modeli · İzmir ofisinde çalışma · Erken aşama yazilim sirketi ortamı ve yüksek sorumluluk alanı #Backend #NodeJS #Python #AI #Izmir #TechHiring #HELYU

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Backend Developer in Turkey. This is an exciting opportunity for an experienced backend engineer to contribute to the development of scalable, secure, and high-performance financial technology solutions used by a global user base. In this role, you will design, enhance, and maintain backend services that power mission-critical digital asset and blockchain platforms. You will work in a fast-paced, innovation-driven environment where reliability, scalability, and security are central to every technical decision. The position offers the chance to collaborate with globally distributed engineering teams while building robust APIs, microservices, and backend infrastructures capable of supporting rapid growth. You will contribute to the architecture of cutting-edge fintech products and play a key role in delivering seamless user experiences across complex distributed systems. This role is ideal for someone passionate about backend engineering, modern financial infrastructure, and large-scale platform performance. Accountabilities Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs that support scalable financial and blockchain-related platforms. Collaborate closely with developers, product managers, designers, and stakeholders to translate technical and business requirements into efficient backend architectures. Improve and optimize existing backend services built with Node.js to enhance scalability, performance, and reliability. Develop new microservices and backend solutions that communicate across distributed systems using RPC and other service integration methods. Write and optimize complex database queries for operational, compliance, and financial reporting purposes. Ensure backend systems follow strong security standards and best practices to protect platform integrity and user data. Contribute to high-availability architectures and real-time service responsiveness as the platform continues to scale globally. Participate in troubleshooting, debugging, and continuous improvement initiatives across backend infrastructure and services. Support agile development processes and contribute to the delivery of innovative features and platform enhancements. Requirements Minimum of 5 years of professional experience working with JavaScript and Node.js in backend development environments. Strong understanding of microservices architecture and distributed backend systems. Proven experience contributing to the development of complex, high-scale platforms or applications. Hands-on experience with relational and NoSQL databases such as MySQL and MongoDB. Good understanding of backend security principles, secure API design, and best development practices. Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies, tools, and technical environments. Familiarity with high-availability systems, real-time services, and scalable backend infrastructures. Experience with blockchain integrations or decentralized technologies is considered a strong advantage. Knowledge of technologies such as Redis, message queues, caches, and background job processing tools is highly desirable. Exposure to Ruby and Ruby on Rails is considered a plus. Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and the ability to work effectively in remote, collaborative teams. Excellent written and verbal English communication skills. Benefits Fully remote work environment with the flexibility to work from anywhere. Opportunity to collaborate with globally distributed teams and industry-leading technology experts. Competitive compensation package aligned with experience and expertise. Exposure to cutting-edge fintech, blockchain, and digital asset technologies. Flexible work culture that supports autonomy, innovation, and continuous learning. Access to challenging large-scale engineering projects with real global impact. Inclusive and collaborative environment focused on technical excellence and professional growth. Opportunity to contribute to highly scalable and security-focused infrastructure used worldwide. Fast-paced, innovation-driven culture that encourages ownership and creativity. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Backend Developer – PHP / Magento / Symfony
description: About Us GGM Gastro is an international company headquartered in Germany, specializing in industrial commercial kitchen technologies. Due to the continued growth of our operations in Turkey and the increasing volume of business transactions, we are seeking a Senior Backend Developer to join our Istanbul (Çağlayan) office, with strong experience in Magento and Symfony. We are looking for a Senior Backend Developer to join our growing tech team and help us build and optimize modern internal business applications. As a Senior Backend Developer, you design innovative e-commerce solutions, transform complex requirements into powerful applications, and contribute your expertise to continuously develop and improve our platforms. What you’ll do: Develop and optimize our web shop and e-commerce systems based on PHP, Magento 2, and Symfony Build high-performance backend structures for our online shops and connected systems Develop APIs and interfaces between shop, ERP, and other platforms Analyze and improve existing shop architectures in terms of performance and scalability Depending on your experience, take on technical ownership or lead sub-projects within the e-commerce environment What you bring: Minimum 5 years of experience in related roles Excellent command of English (at least C1 level) required, German is a strong advantage. Solid experience in PHP (OOP, design patterns) and modern frameworks such as Symfony Experience with Magento 2 or comparable e-commerce systems Confident working with MySQL/MariaDB and API integrations Performance- and scalability-oriented mindset Experienced mid-level developers with a clear specialization in e-commerce are also welcome. What We Offer A position in an internationally successful company Flat hierarchies and a supportive, friendly team Modern office located in Istanbul (Çağlayan) Free daily bakery breakfast Transportation allowance and monthly meal card Additional private health insurance (fully covered by the employer) Internal development and career growth opportunities With us, you can achieve great things! We are looking forward to your applications. Work Type: Full-Time Work Location: On-Site

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced "Full Stack Developer" The job is primarily remote but we expect the candidates to be in Istanbul. Join us if you have a penchant to develop solutions with cutting-edge applications for a better world. What Are The Required Qualifications? Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering or related fields 5+ years of professional software development experience Deep understanding and demonstrated experience in .Net Framework and C# libraries Angular knowledge is required. Expert in .Net Technologies (MVC, Web Forms) and C# language Experience in RESTful & SOAP service technologies Knowledge of object-oriented programming Experience in relational databases, ability to write functions Capable of writing unit tests Deep understanding of Microservices Technologies Experience in RabbitMQ, ElasticSearch, Redis, Docker Experience in Banking is a plus For details: Visit: www.innovance.com.tr Follow us on LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/innovance-consultancy Follow us on Instagram: www.instagram.com/innovanceconsultancy Follow us on Medium: www.medium.com/innovance-company-blog Follow us on X: www.twitter.com/Innovance2017 Follow us on Threads: www.threads.net/@innovanceconsultancy
